criteria.description: The polished longpage renders the simplified Hero, Agent Prompt, Share, and Journey sections in the new information architecture order.
criteria.notes: Integration coverage verifies the four core sections, CTA anchors, and the reordered longpage structure.

criteria.description: The page defaults by system language, supports manual locale switching, preserves Agent-first share wording, and keeps Task 4 as a native external boundary.
criteria.notes: Integration assertions cover English-first detection, manual switch back to Chinese, Agent wording, and the SHIT Skills native-flow guardrail.

criteria.description: The journey simulation stays idle until user intent, the share surface switches between image and text modes, and the production bundle builds successfully.
criteria.evidence: npm run test && npm run build
criteria.notes: Build passed and automated tests verify intent-gated journey playback plus the share mode toggle.

criteria.description: All work packages completed implement and review, and each work package reached approved status before merge.
criteria.evidence: status.json shows WP01-WP05 in approved lane
criteria.notes: WP01 through WP05 were implemented, reviewed, and approved in the Spec Kitty workflow.
